responses: Hello! How can I assist you today?
Hi there! What can I help you with?

patterns: What is the name of this college?
responses: The college is Annamacharya Institute of Technology & Sciences, Tirupati.
AITS Tirupati is located in Venkatapuram, Renigunta, Tirupati, Chittoor District, Andhra Pradesh – 517520, India.

patterns: How can I contact the college?
responses: You can contact the college at Phone: 0877-2285609, 0877-2285608, Mobile: +91-9948149222, +91-9948661276, Emails: aitstpt@yahoo.com or aitsadmissions@gmail.com.

patterns: Where can I find the official site?
responses: The official college website is https://aits-tpt.edu.in/.

patterns: What programmes does the college offer?
responses: AITS Tirupati offers a range of programs including B.Tech (Engineering disciplines), M.Tech (various specializations), MBA and MCA. B.Tech courses include CSE, ECE, EEE, Mechanical, Civil, AI & Data Science, AIML, IoT & Cyber Security, and Data Science. M.Tech and other PG programs are also available.

patterns: How much is the tuition for B.Tech?
responses: The approximate B.Tech tuition fee at AITS Tirupati is around ₹1.6 Lakhs for the entire 4-year program.
The approximate M.Tech tuition fee is around ₹1 Lakh for the full 2-year program.
The MBA and MCA programs at AITS Tirupati cost approximately ₹60,000 to ₹70,000 for the entire duration.

patterns: How do I apply for admission?
responses: Admission details and application forms are available on the official college website under the Admissions section. You may need to participate in entrance tests such as EAPCET/APICET for eligibility.
AITS Tirupati has campus placements with a range of recruiters and placement opportunities. Detailed placement information can be found under the Campus Placements section on the college website.

patterns: What events does the college have?
responses: The college organizes events like graduation day, professional societies activities, and other academic & cultural events listed on the Events & Gallery section of the website.
AITS Tirupati is accredited by NAAC with grade 'A' and NBA for eligible engineering programs, and is recognized under UGC norms.
